message:
fix(precheck): address code review issues

- Log warning when auth pool fails to load (was silently ignoring error)
- Rename 'usage' variable to 'usageStr' to avoid shadowing usage package
- Rename 'status' variable to 'statusStr' for consistency
- Fix test names in TestRenderUsageBar to use descriptive strings
  instead of string(rune(percent)) which created poor test names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
